idea: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For DIY Bicycle Repair Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'DIY bicycle repair'

behavior: Rising interest in DIY bicycle repair indicates increased consumer mobility and discretionary spending on cycling-related goods.

market_impact.rationale: Cycling and outdoor leisure products are part of consumer discretionary and benefit from increased DIY repair interest.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when weekly Google Trends for 'DIY bicycle repair' rises more than 15% compared to prior 3 weeks average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when trend declines 10% from peak

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data often shows cycling repair interest spikes seasonally and after weather changes.

idea: Daily Spike In FRED Weekly Jobless Claims Signals Bearish Financials
behavior: Sudden rise in initial jobless claims indicates increasing labor market stress, pressuring financial sector earnings outlook.

market_impact.rationale: Rising unemployment claims reduce loan demand and increase credit risk for financial institutions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if weekly jobless claims increase more than 5% relative to previous week and above 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if claims drop below 4-week moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Jobless claims data is weekly and frequently exhibits directional changes aligned with economic cycles.

idea: Daily Surge In Google Trends For 'Emergency Truck Repair' Signals Bullish Industrials

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for 'emergency truck repair'

behavior: Increased emergency truck repair searches indicate stress in freight logistics that will boost industrial maintenance demand.

market_impact.rationale: Higher truck repair activity signals rising industrial maintenance and capital spending.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI when daily Google Trends spikes 20% above 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if trend falls below 5-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily Google Trends data for repair-related keywords often spikes abruptly due to seasonal breakdowns and supply chain stress.

idea: Weekly Rise In FRED Producer Price Index For Industrial Metals Signals Bullish Materials

data.source: FRED weekly producer price index for industrial metals

behavior: Rising input costs for industrial metals pressure supply chains but signal strong demand in materials sector.

market_impact.rationale: Higher producer prices reflect demand strength for industrial metals benefiting materials companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLB when weekly PPI for industrial metals rises more than 0.3% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when PPI growth turns negative

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly PPI data regularly shows changes aligned with commodity demand cycles.

idea: Weekly Jump In Google Trends Searches For 'Home Office Ergonomic Chair' Signals Bullish Technology

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home office ergonomic chair'

behavior: Rising searches for home office ergonomic chairs indicate sustained remote work trends boosting tech sector demand.

market_impact.rationale: Remote work increases technology hardware and software demand, benefiting tech ETFs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLK when weekly Google Trends rises 20% above 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when trend falls below 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly interest in home office equipment continuously fluctuates with hybrid work policy updates.

idea: Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Bearish Industrials

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity near major US ports

behavior: Sudden increase in earthquake activity near ports disrupts logistics and manufacturing supply chains.

market_impact.rationale: Port disruptions reduce industrial sector output and increase costs temporarily.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake count near major ports exceeds 3 times the 14-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when earthquake counts normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity near ports can cluster episodically and cause measurable supply chain disruptions.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'used RV sales'

behavior: Rising used RV sales interest indicates increased consumer leisure spending and travel confidence.

market_impact.rationale: RV and leisure vehicle sales boost discretionary sector revenues.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when weekly search interest rises 15% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when interest falls 10% from peak

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Used RV sales searches have seasonal patterns and react quickly to travel sentiment.

idea: Weekly Jump In FRED Natural Gas Inventory Withdrawals Signals Bullish Energy

data.source: FRED weekly natural gas inventory levels

behavior: Larger-than-normal weekly withdrawals from natural gas inventories indicate tightening supply and price pressure.

market_impact.rationale: Energy companies benefit from rising natural gas prices due to tighter inventories.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE if weekly inventory withdrawal is 10% larger than 5-year weekly average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when withdrawals revert to average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Natural gas inventory data is weekly and seasonal, with frequent above-average withdrawal weeks.

behavior: Rising pest control interest signals increased local housing maintenance demand benefiting consumer staples.

market_impact.rationale: Pest control services are part of household essentials and boost staples sector revenues.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP when weekly search interest rises 20% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or on 15% decline from peak interest

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Pest control interest fluctuates seasonally and with local housing conditions, often spiking multiple times a year.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly port volume data regularly shows growth spurts linked to seasonal demand.
